revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:2 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:2月29日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 2월 29일]][[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:二月廿九]][[zh:二月廿九]]
{{Not to be confused with|February 29|qq=February 29}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=二月廿九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 2월 29일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar February|qq=}} '''February 29''' is the 29th day of the month {{ill|February (Lunisolar)|ja|2月 (旧暦)|lt=February (Kisaragi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 2nd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小|qq=}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise, if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大|qq=}}, then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11635368}}. == Events == * {{ill|Kōan (Kamakura period)|en|Kōan (Kamakura period)|qid=Q389180|lt=Kōan (Kamakura period)|1=Kōan (Kamakura period)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1278|en|1278|qid=Q5533|lt=1278|1=1278}} {{ill|March 23|en|March 23|qid=Q2445|lt=March 23|1=March 23}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Kenji (era)|en|Kenji (era)|qid=Q1327993|lt=Kenji|1=Kenji (era)}} to {{ill|Kōan (Kamakura period)|en|Kōan (Kamakura period)|qid=Q389180|lt=Kōan|1=Kōan (Kamakura period)}}. * {{ill|Shōryaku|en|Shōryaku|qid=Q1324858|lt=Shōkyō|1=Shōryaku}} 5th year / {{ill|Engen|en|Engen|qid=Q1194159|lt=Engen|1=Engen}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1336|en|1336|qid=Q6028|lt=1336|1=1336}} {{ill|April 11|en|April 11|qid=Q2501|lt=April 11|1=April 11}}) – The Southern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Jianwu|en|Jianwu|qid=Q11065423|lt=Kenmu|1=Jianwu}} to {{ill|Engen|en|Engen|qid=Q1194159|lt=Engen|1=Engen}}. * {{ill|Bunki|en|Bunki|qid=Q1324885|lt=Bunkai|1=Bunki}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1501|en|1501|qid=Q6131|lt=1501|1=1501}} {{ill|March 18|en|March 18|qid=Q2422|lt=March 18|1=March 18}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Meiō|en|Meiō|qid=Q1193841|lt=Meio|1=Meiō}} to {{ill|Bunki|en|Bunki|qid=Q1324885|lt=Bunkai|1=Bunki}}. * {{ill|Meireki|en|Meireki|qid=Q1192766|lt=Meireki|1=Meireki}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1657|en|1657|qid=Q6987|lt=1657|1=1657}} {{ill|April 12|en|April 12|qid=Q2499|lt=April 12|1=April 12}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate built a memorial temple ({{ill|Ekō-in|en|Ekō-in|qid=Q3049659|lt=Kaikō-in|1=Ekō-in}}) in the new district of Honjo Ushijima, to enshrine the souls of more than 100,000 people who perished in the great fire of Edo. * {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|qid=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun|1=Kanbun (era)}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1662|en|1662|qid=Q7574|lt=1662|1=1662}} {{ill|April 17|en|April 17|qid=Q2520|lt=April 17|1=April 17}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate defined the duties of the {{ill|Rōjū|en|Rōjū|qid=Q1196812|lt=Rōjū|1=Rōjū}} and {{ill|Wakadoshiyori|en|Wakadoshiyori|qid=Q1036547|lt=Wakadoshiyori|1=Wakadoshiyori}}. * {{ill|Meiwa|en|Meiwa|qid=Q1146161|lt=Meiwa|1=Meiwa}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1772|en|1772|qid=Q7690|lt=1772|1=1772}} {{ill|April 1|en|April 1|qid=Q2510|lt=April 1|1=April 1}}) – The great fire of Meiwa (the fire at Meguro Gyōnin-zaka) occurred. == Births == * {{ill|Kanpō|en|Kanpō|qid=Q1145798|lt=Kanpō|1=Kanpō}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1741|en|1741|qid=Q7573|lt=1741|1=1741}} {{ill|April 14|en|April 14|qid=Q2500|lt=April 14|1=April 14}}) – Emperor Momozono ({{ill|Emperor Momozono|en|Emperor Momozono|qid=Q313864|lt=Momozono Tennō|1=Emperor Momozono}}), the 116th Emperor of Japan (died {{ill|1762|en|1762|qid=Q7652|lt=1762|1=1762}}). * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1850|en|1850|qid=Q7653|lt=1850|1=1850}} {{ill|April 11|en|April 11|qid=Q2501|lt=April 11|1=April 11}}) – {{ill|Hayashi Tadasu|en|Hayashi Tadasu|qid=Q1138734|lt=Hayashi Tōdō|1=Hayashi Tadasu}}, a diplomat and politician (died {{ill|1913|en|1913|qid=Q2080|lt=1913|1=1913}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1855|en|1855|qid=Q7673|lt=1855|1=1855}} {{ill|April 15|en|April 15|qid=Q2497|lt=April 15|1=April 15}}) – {{ill|Tōyama Kagemoto|en|Tōyama Kagemoto|qid=Q7862747|lt=Toyama Kagemoto|1=Tōyama Kagemoto}} (also known as Toyama Kinsirō), an Edo Machi Bugyō and official (born {{ill|1793|en|1793|qid=Q7807|lt=1793|1=1793}}). == Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|2|28|2|30|1|29|3|2|0229|qq=}} ==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:二月廿九]]
{{translated page|ja|2月29日 (旧暦)|version=90387019|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[cdo:2 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:February 29 (Lunisolar)]] [[qq:February 29 (Lunisolar)]]
[[ko:음력 2월 29일]] [[ja:2月29日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:二月廿九]]
[[ar:February 29 (Lunisolar)]]
